comment: only sphere output and graph looks bad

conversation.content: make a sphere and evaluate it as surface and place 10 random points with minimal distance between them than place spheres with bases on points on big sphere surface and make radius smaller than minimal distance on the surface of the sphere
Response was not valid JSON (attempt 1/3) — asking the model to resend.
A large sphere with 10 smaller spheres scattered on its surface, each small sphere's radius proportional to the minimal spacing between scattered points
Structural validation error (does not count against repair budget, 1/3) — asking the model to fix.

The IR-generated on_circle expansion created disconnected nodes. I'll replace them with a clean ScatterOnSurface approach: scatter small spheres directly onto the big sphere's surface with count driven by pointCount, and small sphere radius proportional to minDist.
Structural validation error (does not count against repair budget, 2/3) — asking the model to fix.
Edges were dropped because target handles were embedded in the target node ID. The patch protocol infers handles from node type, so I just need source and target node IDs.
Issues detected (auto-repair 2/2): Leaf "scatter" has a non-finite bounding box (degenerate geometry).; Leaf "scatter" has non-positive volume (0) — likely inverted or degenerate solid.

ScatterOnSurface produces degenerate geometry on a sphere. I'll replace it with a parametric point distribution: Series for indices, Expressions to compute spherical coordinates (theta/phi → x/y/z on the sphere surface), PointsFromLists to build the point set, then InstanceOnPoints to place small spheres.
Structural validation error (does not count against repair budget, 3/3) — asking the model to fix.
A large sphere with 10 small spheres distributed on its surface using Fibonacci sphere points, small radius proportional to minDist
Structural validation error (exemptions exhausted, counts against repair budget) — asking the model to fix.
Auto-repair limit reached. Remaining issues: Structural validation failed

leaves.error: Node "surfPts_x" (PointsFromLists) produced no geometry — check its parameters are valid numbers within range.
Node "placed" (InstanceOnPoints) is null because its input(s) came from failed upstream node(s): surfPts_x. Fix the upstream node first.

nodeErrors.error: Expression error: unknown variable 'a': in an Expression, a/b/c/d are per-element variables supplied by wiring a number list (Series/Range/ListConstant/PointsFromLists/another Expression) into the 'a' input handle. Nothing is wired to 'a'. Add that edge — do NOT replace 'a' with a slider name, which drops the per-element mapping. Sliders in scope: sphereradius, pointcount, mindist.
